description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet with a single, wide drawer on the front, featuring a black circular knob handle. The wood grain is clearly visible across all surfaces, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The cabinet stands on four straight, sturdy legs, elevating the main body above the ground. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or openings, emphasizing a minimalist design. The front face is distinguished by the geometric pattern of the wood grain converging toward the central knob. This piece is suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A small, natural wood cabinet with a single front drawer and black knob, standing on four legs with a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer with a black knob and converging wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wooden surface with visible grain, no hardware or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, uninterrupted wooden panel with natural grain.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain wooden surface and no visible features.
